description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build TWiLight Menu++ Nightly that builds TWiLightMenu++ on every push to any branch and on every pull request. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a devkitpro/devkitarm container that checks out the repository, installs tools, builds TWiLightMenu++, creates CIAs, packs 7z packages, and publishes the build to TWLBot/Builds. Also, send Discord webhooks on success or failure.
